proof_boundary: This artifact freezes app-lane probabilities before resolution for the benchmark top-10. It is not a resolved accuracy result, top-three claim, buyer approval, or external benchmark ranking.

source_policy.hosted: Preferred source: hosted analyze-engine plus multi-agent-forecast edge functions when callable with available environment.
source_policy.local_mirror: Fallback source: deterministic local mirror of the multi-agent-forecast role-weighted probability lane when the hosted path fails for a question.

forecasts.title: Major conflict escalation monitor
forecasts.question_text: Will the CFR Global Conflict Tracker classify at least one monitored conflict as worsening by 2026-09-30?

forecasts.title: G7 leadership change outcome
forecasts.question_text: Will any G7 country install a new head of government through a national election or parliamentary confidence process by 2026-12-31?

forecasts.title: Federal Reserve easing surprise
forecasts.question_text: Will the FOMC target range upper bound be at least 50 basis points lower on 2026-09-30 than the range in force on 2026-06-07?

forecasts.title: Brent crude upside shock
forecasts.question_text: Will front-month Brent crude settle above USD 95 on any trading day by 2026-12-31?

forecasts.title: Gold safe-haven breakout
forecasts.question_text: Will the LBMA PM gold price exceed USD 3800 per troy ounce on any fixing day by 2026-12-31?

forecasts.title: S&P 500 drawdown risk
forecasts.question_text: Will the S&P 500 close at least 10 percent below its 2026-06-07 reference close on any trading day by 2026-12-31?

forecasts.title: US dollar index upside risk
forecasts.question_text: Will the US Dollar Index close above 110 on any trading day by 2026-12-31?

forecasts.title: Major trade-dispute initiation
forecasts.question_text: Will the WTO publish a new dispute involving the United States, European Union, or China as a complainant or respondent by 2026-12-31?

forecasts.title: Atlantic major hurricane occurrence
forecasts.question_text: Will NOAA report at least one Atlantic named storm reaching Category 4 or 5 intensity by 2026-11-30?

forecasts.title: EU AI Act high-risk timing change
forecasts.question_text: Will the EU publish binding law by 2026-12-31 that delays the first application date for EU AI Act high-risk AI obligations?
